title: agrostis elliotii
intro: Agrostis elliotii, also known as Elliot's bentgrass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis elliotii include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Agrostis elliotii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
